text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon runs impressively in today's G1
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She senses something which can't be verified through testing alone. Thus, she considers changing some plan so that she may ascertain this doubt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Japanese Derby. Whether or not
she'll actually run remains solely up to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even now, I'm left unable to tell what she's
thinking.
